news.headline: Investor rights law firm investigates CPTN, GATO, B, ALTM for potential securities law violations.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm focusing on investor rights, announced an investigation into certain companies for possible breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary responsibilities to shareholders. This includes Cepton, Inc. (NASDAQ: CPTN). The investigation is related to Cepton's sale transaction. Further details and implications of the investigation were not provided in the announcement.

news.headline: South East Asia jewellery market projected to grow at 5.2% CAGR during 2024-2030, boosted by tourism. Key targets include Cambodia.
news.summary: Dublin, (BUSINESS WIRE) - A report on the South East Asia Jewellery Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market is anticipated to experience a 5.2% CAGR between 2024 and 2030. Tourism significantly influences jewellery sales in South East Asia. Key markets in the region to watch include Cambodia.

news.headline: Bitcoin dips below $97K; Dogecoin, XRP, Solana decline. BTC rose to $100K briefly. Market sees widespread slide.
news.summary: The value of Bitcoin temporarily surpassed $100,000 on Monday morning but has since declined, causing a drop in the prices of various other significant assets as well.

This includes Adams Resources & Energy, Inc. listed on the NYSE. The firm is examining possible violations and breaches that could negatively impact shareholders.

news.headline: Security 101 acquires two franchisees in Dallas and Denver, expanding national presence.
news.summary: A recent development in the security industry saw Security 101 acquiring franchise locations in Dallas and Denver, solidifying its national footprint. This move is set to bolster the company's ability to provide cutting-edge security solutions across the country.

news.headline: Girl Scouts gets $30M grant from Lilly Endowment Inc. to boost character development for girls nationwide.
news.summary: In New York on December 9, 2024, the Girl Scouts of the USA announced a substantial boost for their initiatives, with a $30 million grant from Lilly Endowment Inc. This funding aims to support a wider reach for the organization, empowering girls nationwide by fostering confidence, self-worth, and essential character development. The investment is set to enhance programs that focus on building key traits in girls, ensuring their ability to succeed and grow.

news.headline: Canada Loyalty Programs to reach $7.09 billion by 2028, driven by participation, personalization, tech integration - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: Dublin-based research firm released a report on the Canada Loyalty Programs Market, stating that the industry is projected to grow by 10.0% annually, reaching US$5.09 billion by 2024. The report, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, covers over 50 key performance indicators on loyalty programs, focusing on trends in end-use sectors, operational metrics, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics. The Canadian loyalty market has shown significant growth potential, as indicated by the projected numbers.

news.headline: MDClone named one of Modern Healthcare's Best in Business of 2024, featured in Dec. 9 issue.
news.summary: A renowned data exploration and synthetic data firm based in Chicago, MDClone, has received recognition from Modern Healthcare as one of the top businesses of 2024. The latest issue of MH magazine features the complete list of honorees.

news.summary: Vision RNG has reached a deal with NRG Business Marketing to sell more than 47,000 landfill gas carbon credits from the Lunenburg Landfill located in Virginia.

news.headline: Progressive declares $4.50 annual and $0.10 quarterly dividends on Dec. 6, 2024. Annual meeting record date announced.
news.summary: In Mayfield Village, OH on December 9, 2024, The Progressive Corporation (NYSE: PGR) announced its Board of Directors' decision on December 6, 2024, to declare annual and quarterly dividends for common shares. The annual dividend was set at $4.50 per share, while the quarterly dividend was established at $0.10 per share.

news.headline: Nevada commissioner rejects Rupert Murdoch's attempt to transfer control of his empire to son Lachlan, maintaining Fox News's right-wing stance.
news.summary: In a recent decision, a Nevada commissioner strongly opposed Mr. Murdoch's attempt to transfer complete ownership of his empire to his son Lachlan and solidify Fox News's conservative editorial stance.

news.headline: Seminole Brighton Bay Hotel & Casino in Okeechobee, Fla., accepting reservations for March 2025 onwards; grand opening in Feb 2025.
news.summary: Located in Okeechobee, Florida, the Seminole Brighton Bay Hotel & Casino is set to have its grand opening in February 2025. Reservations are now being accepted for stays starting from March 2025 onwards. Visitors can secure their bookings either through the Seminole Brighton Bay Hotel & Casino website or by contacting the hotel directly. The opening ceremony marks an important milestone for the hotel, which aims to offer a unique experience for guests looking to enjoy the amenities and entertainment options available.

news.summary: Stock markets, including the Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq, remained in the red during Monday afternoon trading. Shares of bitcoin-related companies took a hit as the price of bitcoin retreated from its recent peak. Nvidia shares also declined, contributing to the overall losses in the market. For up-to-the-minute coverage, stay tuned to the latest updates from Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: National Center for Public Policy suggests Amazon allocate 5% assets to Bitcoin; Microsoft shareholders ponder BTC investment.
news.summary: According to a recent recommendation by the National Center for Public Policy, Amazon is advised to allocate at least 5% of its assets towards Bitcoin. This suggestion comes at a time when Microsoft is also reportedly contemplating a strategic move involving Bitcoin.

news.headline: Espey announces dividend of $0.25/share, payable on Dec. 27, 2024, to shareholders of record on Dec. 20, 2024. New corporate secretary appointed.
news.summary: A company based in Saratoga Springs, New York, Espey Mfg. & Electronics Corp. (NYSE AMERICAN: ESP), announced on December 9, 2024, that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share. Shareholders of record as of December 20, 2024, will receive the dividend on December 27, 2024.

news.headline: Oliveda Intl.'s Olive Tree People leads waterless beauty movement with 2,850% growth, 50,000 consultants, $100M turnover. Expanding globally.
news.summary: Santa Monica, California - Oliveda International, Inc. (OTC Pink: OLVI) shared today that its Olive Tree People Inc. subsidiary has achieved remarkable success. With an incredible 2,850% growth rate, the company has amassed nearly 50,000 waterless beauty consultants. In just its second year operating in the U.S., the subsidiary has generated approximately a $100 million turnover. This makes Olive Tree People Inc. not only the fastest-growing waterless beauty business in the U.S. and globally, but also one of the most rapidly expanding organic beauty firms, especially within the direct-to-consumer sector. The company's success has paved the way for its expansion into international markets, starting with Canada, followed by the UK/Europe, and eventually to other regions worldwide.

news.headline: Global artificial intelligence market to grow by USD 64.9 billion (2024-2028), driven by AI solution demand, showing 45.1% CAGR.
news.summary: According to a recent report utilizing AI technology, the global market for artificial intelligence platforms is forecasted to increase by approximately USD 64.9 billion between 2024 and 2028. Research conducted by Technavio suggests that the market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 45.1% over this period.

news.headline: Apple market to increase by USD 14.71B from 2024-2028 due to rising demand for superfoods, driven by AI trends - Technavio.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was highlighted how artificial intelligence (AI) is reshaping the market. Over the period of 2024 to 2028, the global apple market is expected to increase by USD 14.71 billion as projected by Technavio. The market is forecasted to exhibit a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.25% during this period.

news.headline: Park Aerospace Corp. (NYSE: PKE) announces cash dividend of $0.125 per share, payable on Feb 4, 2025 to shareholders of record on Jan 3, 2025.

This dividend is set to be paid on February 4, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded as such by the end of business on January 3, 2025. The company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol PKE, continues to provide value to its shareholders through this dividend declaration.

Prospect Capital hosting webinar on preferred stocks' benefits for financial pros on Dec. 12, 2024, at 2:00 pm ET. Earn 1 CE Credit.

This event, scheduled for December 12, 2024, at 2:00pm ET, aims to offer insights into the unique aspects of preferred stock as compared to other fixed income investments. Inventor from Ohio creates Pregnancy Panties for pregnant women with bladder issues, aims for comfort and support.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 9, 2024, an inventor from Lancaster, Ohio, expressed the motivation behind creating a new product. The inventor shared that the goal was to provide a comfortable and hygienic solution for pregnant women dealing with bladder leaks or control problems. This innovation led to the creation of the PREGNANCY PANTIES. The specially designed underwear aims to offer support and absorbency for expecting mothers facing such challenges.

Canada's gift card market to reach $9.4 billion by 2028, with 6.5% annual growth to $7.7 billion in 2024. Local programs gaining traction.
news.summary: A recent report, "Canada Gift Card and Incentive Card Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics Databook," has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com offerings. The gift card sector in Canada is projected to experience a 6.5% annual growth rate, reaching US$7.7 billion by 2024. Furthermore, the Canadian gift card market is anticipated to maintain growth, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.9% expected between 2024 and 2028. Presently valued at US$7.3 billion, the gift card industry in Canada is set to expand significantly.

news.headline: Fortis Inc. renews its ATM Equity Program, allowing issuance of up to C$500 million (or USD equivalent) of Common Shares.
news.summary: St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador, Dec. 09, 2024 - Fortis Inc. (TSX/NYSE: FTS) revealed its decision to renew the at-the-market equity program (ATM Program), permitting the Corporation to offer up to C$500,000,000 (or its U.S. dollar equivalent) of common shares (Common Shares) from treasury to the public intermittently at the Corporation's discretion. Common Shares under the ATM Program will be vended through the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX), the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), or any other applicable marketplace where the Common Shares are listed or traded at the current market price.

news.headline: "Taste the Difference" campaign brings quality European wines to US, partners with Italian & Spanish institutions. NYC highlighted. EU-funded program.
news.summary: Italian and Spanish institutions have joined forces to promote the PDO and PGI European Quality Schemes. In a recent collaboration, these renowned establishments are working towards enhancing awareness of the program. The initiative, known as Taste the Difference: Quality Wines from the heart of Europe (TTD), is supported by the European Union. This partnership aims to boost recognition of European quality standards. This announcement was made in New York on December 9, 2024.

news.headline: Six Flags-Cedar Fair merger yields $200 million in synergies, analyst predicts significant growth potential. Katz initiates Buy rating, $59 target price. Smooth integration anticipated with minimal park overlap.
news.summary: Analyst David Katz from Jefferies has initiated coverage on Six Flags Entertainment Corporation (NYSE: FUN) with a Buy rating and a price target of $59.00. Katz believes that the merger between Six Flags and Cedar Fair presents a strong long-term opportunity, with Cedar Fair's management well-positioned to unlock significant earnings potential. On July 1, the merger between legacy Cedar Fair and legacy Six Flags was finalized, forming the new combined company, Six Flags Entertainment Corporation. Katz anticipates a smooth integration due to minimal geographic overlap between the two companies' parks. Additionally, he foresees Cedar Fair's management maximizing the value of Six Flags' assets and achieving substantial gains from the merger.

news.headline: Seattle Orcas & Boys & Girls Clubs of Bellevue team up for Holiday Cricket & Sports Equipment Drive, fostering grassroots access to the sport.
news.summary: In Seattle, the Orcas have partnered with the Boys & Girls Clubs of Bellevue to gather cricket gear for young athletes in the area. They aim to enhance grassroots access to the sport by inviting community members to participate. The collaboration was announced on December 9, 2024, with the initiative focusing on collecting holiday cricket and sports equipment. This joint effort seeks to support local youth by providing them with the necessary gear for their athletic endeavors.

news.headline: Inventor from Mount Vernon, Ohio creates ALPHA S E L T Z E R formula to prevent hangovers; low-calorie formula.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Mount Vernon, Ohio, revealed the creation of ALPHA S E L T Z E R, a low-calorie formula designed to combat hangover symptoms resulting from excessive drinking the night before. The inventor aimed to help individuals prevent hangovers by introducing this innovative product.
